title: The King's Gallery
description: Adds in 5 new paintings and 4 new hats
body:
This Resource pack replaces Five Paintings (see gallery)
- Pointer = Cine City
- Courbet = King Ben
- Kebab = Wreath
- Wanderer = Portrait
#   
it also adds nine new Hats (rename a carved pumpkin these exact names)
- Crown
- Top Hat
- Bowler Hat
- Ranger Hat
- Halo
- Blindfold
- Blob
- Conductor
- Blue Conductor
